name: 深情告白與仙界婚約
name_en: Heartfelt Confession and Celestial Marriage Vow
description: 男主在女主犧牲修為後深情求婚，跨越凡間與仙界的愛情承諾讓浪漫感達到極致。『百年千年甚至萬年』的時間尺度讓告白超越凡人格局。

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: Xixi, would you like to marry me? / I do / For the next hundred or thousand years / Even ten thousand years / I will treat you well. / Stay with you
